---
title: "Atika Syeda"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg

  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:syedaa@janelia.hhmi.org

    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Atika-Syeda

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atika-syeda-73a556171/

    - icon: graduation-cap
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AebpXJgAAAAJ&hl=en
---

I am a PhD student in neuroscience in the joint **Johns Hopkins University–HHMI Janelia Research Campus Graduate Program**, where I am jointly advised by the [Stringer & Pachitariu Lab](https://mouseland.github.io). My research lies at the intersection of neuroscience and artificial intelligence, with a particular focus on developing machine learning methods to better understand large-scale neural datasets.



## Education

**Johns Hopkins University & HHMI Janelia Research Campus | MD/VA, USA**  
PhD in Neuroscience  
2022 - Present  

**University of Oxford | Oxford, UK**  
MSc in Neuroscience  
2019 - 2020  

**University of Calgary | Calgary, Canada**  
BHSc in Bioinformatics (Hons)  
2015 - 2019  


## Experience

**HHMI Janelia Research Campus | MD/VA, USA**
Research/Software consultant  
2019 - 2022
